---
title: "Spatial Distribution of Farmers Markets in Philadelphia"
description: "A project that utilises spatial analysis in R and GeoDa to examine the distribution of farmers markets in Philadelphia."
author: "Robert Mullins"
date: 2025-02-21
image: "/images/market.jpg"

categories: [Data Analytics, R, GeoDA]
---

## Overview

Placeholder

::: {.callout-note}
This project was completed as part of "Spatial Econometrics and Data" at Waseda University, Japan. 
:::

## Read the full report

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} Read Full Report](/projects/reports/spatial_distribution.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

<iframe src="/projects/reports/spatial_distribution.pdf" 
        width="100%" 
        height="800px"
        style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;">
</iframe>

---
